category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular IoT device compliance comparison for export from China to Montenegro.

title.en: China-to-Montenegro Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (EKIP)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入黑山：EKIP合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入蒙特內哥羅：EKIP合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Montenegrin EKIP type approval / notification requirements under the Law on Electronic Communications, covering radio type approval, EMC (EN standards via IEST), electrical safety (230 V / 50 Hz, Type C/F), local importer / authorised representative obligation, Montenegrin/Serbian language labelling, and EKIP/NIS cybersecurity framework.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与黑山《电子通信法》下EKIP型式核准/通知要求的差距对照，涵盖无线电型式核准、电磁兼容（通过IEST的EN标准）、电气安全（230V/50Hz，C/F型插头）、本地进口商/授权代表义务、黑山/塞尔维亚语标注及EKIP/NIS网络安全框架。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與蒙特內哥羅《電子通訊法》下EKIP型式核准/通知要求的差距對照，涵蓋無線電型式核准、電磁相容（通過IEST的EN標準）、電氣安全（230V/50Hz，C/F型插頭）、本地進口商/授權代表義務、蒙特內哥羅/塞爾維亞語標注及EKIP/NIS網路安全框架。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, EKIP type approval or notification, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current Montenegrin regulations, applicable EN/MNE standards, labelling requirements, and market-entry obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Montenegro.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、EKIP型式核准或通知、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于黑山销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行黑山法规、适用EN/MNE标准、标注要求及市场准入义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、EKIP型式核准或通知、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於蒙特內哥羅銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行蒙特內哥羅法規、適用EN/MNE標準、標注要求及市場准入義務。

answer_first.en: EKIP mandatory type approval / market notification (CE DoC alone is not sufficient — EKIP notification is a separate obligation), EN harmonised standards via IEST for radio and EMC testing (accepted as technical evidence but EKIP notification still required separately), EN IEC 62368-1 electrical safety for 230 V / 50 Hz / Type C/F, appointment of a local Montenegrin importer / authorised representative, Montenegrin/Serbian language labelling, and cybersecurity per EKIP/NIS framework are the major compliance gaps compared with Chinese SRRC radio type approval, CCC certification, and GB standards. CCC is not recognised in Montenegro.
answer_first.zh: 与中国SRRC无线电型式核准、CCC认证及GB标准相比，黑山的主要合规差距包括：EKIP强制型式核准/市场通知（CE符合性声明单独不满足要求——EKIP通知是独立义务）、IEST采用的EN协调标准（无线电及电磁兼容测试，作为技术证明被接受，但仍须单独完成EKIP通知）、EN IEC 62368-1电气安全标准（230V/50Hz/C/F型插头）、指定本地黑山进口商/授权代表、黑山/塞尔维亚语标注以及EKIP/NIS网络安全框架。CCC认证在黑山不被认可。
answer_first.zht: 與中國SRRC無線電型式核准、CCC認證及GB標準相比，蒙特內哥羅的主要合規差距包括：EKIP強制型式核准/市場通知（CE符合性聲明單獨不滿足要求——EKIP通知是獨立義務）、IEST採用的EN協調標準（無線電及電磁相容測試，作為技術證明被接受，但仍須單獨完成EKIP通知）、EN IEC 62368-1電氣安全標準（230V/50Hz/C/F型插頭）、指定本地蒙特內哥羅進口商/授權代表、蒙特內哥羅/塞爾維亞語標注以及EKIP/NIS網路安全框架。CCC認證在蒙特內哥羅不被認可。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or on major EKIP / IEST regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. human_reviewed requires named reviewer sign-off.
